name: witchcraft-and-wizardry-foundry-vtt
description: Foundry VTT system for the Witchcraft and Wizardry PbtA tabletop RPG.

scripts.build: npm run build:packs && npm run pack
scripts.pack: npm run pack:spells && npm run pack:moves && npm run pack:traits && npm run pack:potions && npm run pack:houses
scripts.pack:spells: fvtt package pack spells --id witchcraft-and-wizardry --type System --in packs/src/spells --out packs
scripts.pack:moves: fvtt package pack moves --id witchcraft-and-wizardry --type System --in packs/src/moves --out packs
scripts.pack:traits: fvtt package pack traits --id witchcraft-and-wizardry --type System --in packs/src/traits --out packs
scripts.pack:potions: fvtt package pack potions --id witchcraft-and-wizardry --type System --in packs/src/potions --out packs
scripts.pack:houses: fvtt package pack houses --id witchcraft-and-wizardry --type System --in packs/src/houses --out packs
scripts.unpack: fvtt package unpack spells --id witchcraft-and-wizardry --type System --in packs --out packs/src/spells

author: SebastianCotrina16
